scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured calculation or lookup outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within specialized research tooling scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured calculation or lookup outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: Both gestational and followup modes work correctly; future LMP warning field now in output schema; --timezone parameter added

reliability.note: Future LMP warning documented; --weeks >= 1 validation documented; timezone handling documented; one minor gap: no validation for dates before 1900

performance_context.note: Token usage is proportional to input complexity; execution overhead is acceptable for specialized research tooling tasks though room for compression exists.

agent_usability.note: Fallback template documented; response template clear; validation rules section added; --timezone parameter documented with pytz names

human_usability.note: When-to-Use and When-Not-to-Use sections are clearly stated; error scenarios and recovery paths are documented for typical specialized research tooling use cases.

security.note: No credential concerns; date parsing uses strptime with fixed format; no injection risk

maintainability.note: Clean class-based design; good docstrings; 125 lines; well-structured; validation rules clearly documented

agent_specific.note: Trigger description is precise; output format documented with examples including warning field; --timezone parameter documented

inputs.label: Gestational age from LMP 2024-01-15
inputs.note: Output: 113 weeks 3 days (794 days from 2024-01-15 to 2026-03-19). EDD 2024-10-21 is correct. Warning field now in output schema for future LMP dates.

assertions.note: Output format conforms to the expected structure without anomalies.

assertions.text: Gestational age in days matches weeks calculation

inputs.label: 4-week follow-up window from 2024-03-01
inputs.note: window_start 2024-03-29, window_end 2024-04-05 (7-day window). Correct. --timezone parameter now documented.

assertions.note: Output format conforms to the expected structure without anomalies.

assertions.text: window_start is exactly 4 weeks after start_date
window_range string matches window_start and window_end
assertions.note: Confirmed: window_range string matches window_start and window_end as expected.

inputs.label: Custom 6-week follow-up with 5-day window
inputs.note: window_start 2024-04-12, window_end 2024-04-17. Correct. --weeks >= 1 validation now documented.

assertions.note: Output format conforms to the expected structure without anomalies.

assertions.text: window_start is exactly 6 weeks after start_date

inputs.label: Invalid date format and future LMP input
inputs.note: Invalid date format rejected with exit code 1. Future LMP now produces warning field in output JSON per updated SKILL.md schema. --weeks 0 now documented to be rejected.

assertions.text: Invalid date format is rejected with a clear error message
assertions.note: Error: Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD

assertions.text: Script exits with non-zero code on invalid input
Future LMP date produces warning field in output JSON
assertions.note: SKILL.md output schema now includes warning field for future LMP dates

assertions.text: --weeks < 1 is documented to be rejected with clear error

key_strengths: Both gestational and followup calculation modes produce correct, well-structured JSON output with all edge cases documented
Future LMP warning field added to output schema; --weeks >= 1 validation documented; --timezone parameter added
Clean class-based implementation with good docstrings; validation rules section clearly documents all constraints
Scope boundary explicitly rejects non-medical date requests; EDD correctly implements Naegele's rule

recommendations.title: Timezone handling documented but pytz dependency not in requirements
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents --timezone parameter using pytz timezone names, but pytz is not listed as a dependency and the script may not import it.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation added pytz usage without verifying script implementation.
recommendations.fix: Add pytz to requirements.txt (or use Python 3.9+ zoneinfo module). Verify script uses datetime.now(tz=pytz.timezone(args.timezone)) when --timezone is provided.

recommendations.title: No validation for dates before 1900 or after 2100
recommendations.problem: Extremely old or far-future dates are accepted without warning, which could produce confusing gestational age calculations.
recommendations.root_cause: No date range bounds checking beyond format validation.
recommendations.fix: Add a reasonable date range check: if date < 1900-01-01 or date > 2100-01-01, include a warning field in the output JSON.
